alkylation reagent: Cysteine alkylation by iodoacetamide was specified as fixed modification
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin (Promega) for 16 h at 37 °C
collision energy: top 20 MS/MS events, sequentially generated on the first to the twentieth most intense ions selected from the full MS spectrum at a 28% normalized collision energy
fragmentation method: Data-dependent MS/MS analysis was performed with a Q Exactive-Orbitrap mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific)
instrument: LC-MS/MS analysis was carried out on a Thermo LC-MS Q Exactive-Orbitrap system
ionization type: Peptides eluted from the LC column were directly electro-sprayed into the mass spectrometer
labeling: semi-quantitative analysis of the SPM bound by ATP13A2 in different intermediate states
